# HPD.ML.Regression.OnlineGradientDescentLearner

- Package: `HPD-ML-Regression` `0.5.0`
- Assembly: `HPD.ML.Regression`
- Namespace: `HPD.ML.Regression`
- Kind: `class`

Online gradient descent for regression with squared loss. Processes one sample at a time, supports weight averaging and warm-start.

## Declaration

```csharp
public sealed class OnlineGradientDescentLearner : HPD.ML.Abstractions.ILearner
```
